pages.text:
NOTE NO. 20/90

L'Ambassade d'Australie présente ges conpliments au

Ministère des Affaires Etrangeres et a l'honneur de lui faire parvenir un Instrument d'acceptation concernant les modifications apportées le 31 mai 1988 à la Convention relative aux expositions internationales.

L'Ambassade d'Australie saisit cette occasion pour renouveler au Ministère des Affaires Etrangères les assurances de sa très haute considération.

ALIAN

PARIS, le 29 janvier 1990

WHEREAS Australia is a party to the Convention relating to International Exhibitions, done at Paris on the twenty-second day of November, one thousand nine hundred and twenty-eight; and

WHEREAS the General Assembly meeting in paris on 31

May 1988 adopted Amendments to the Convention; and

WHEREAS Australia, as a party to the Convention, may accept the Amendments.

THE GOVERNMENT OF AUSTRALIA, having considered the

Amendments, now hereby ACCEPTS the same for and on behalf of

Australia.

IN WITNESS WHEREOE, I, GARETH JOHN EVANS, Minister Of

State for Foreign Affairs and Trade of Australia, have hereunto set my hand and affixed my seal.

DONE at Canteen this elmerse day of January, one thousand nine hundred and ninety.

Minister of State for Foreign Affairs and Trade of Australia
